script:
set +e
echo '=== chattr attributes on aixa creds ==='
lsattr /home/aixa/.claude/.credentials.json 2>&1
echo '=== fuser - is file open by a process? ==='
fuser -v /home/aixa/.claude/.credentials.json 2>&1
echo '=== explicit chown -v just the file ==='
chown -v aixa:aixa /home/aixa/.claude/.credentials.json 2>&1
stat -c '%U:%G %n' /home/aixa/.claude/.credentials.json 2>&1
echo '=== test aixa can read the file now ==='
sudo -u aixa cat /home/aixa/.claude/.credentials.json 2>&1 | head -c 80
echo
echo '=== test claude as aixa ==='
sudo -u aixa bash -c 'echo hi | timeout 30 /home/azureuser/.npm-global/bin/claude -p --model claude-opus-4-7 --max-turns 1 --output-format text 2>&1' | head -8
echo '===END==='
